name: fhe-x402-payment
description: FHE-encrypted x402 payment skill for AI agents. Wrap USDC to encrypted cUSDC, make confidential payments, unwrap back to USDC.
author: Himess

amount.description: Amount of USDC to wrap (e.g. '2' for 2 USDC)

pay.description: Send encrypted cUSDC payment to another address

amount.description: Amount of USDC to pay (e.g. '1' for 1 USDC)

unwrap.description: Request unwrap of cUSDC back to USDC (step 1 of 2)

finalizeUnwrap.description: Finalize unwrap after KMS decryption callback (step 2 of 2)

burntAmount.description: The encrypted amount handle from the unwrap request

cleartextAmount.description: The decrypted cleartext amount from KMS

balance.description: Check wallet USDC balance and encrypted cUSDC status

info.description: Display wallet, contract addresses, and network info

PRIVATE_KEY.description: Ethereum private key for signing transactions

RPC_URL.description: Ethereum RPC URL (default: Sepolia public node)
